name: ORODIGITOFACIAL SYNDROME
definition: OROFACIODIGITAL SYNDROME heterogeneous group of defects, probably representing varying expressivity, involving face,

demographics.Etiology: autosomal trisomy of chromosome No. 1 with 47 chromosomes; X-linked dominant
demographics.Sex: nuclear chromatin pattern female (lethal in male)

discriminating_features: hypoplasia of mandible (micrognathia) + occiput of skull
clinodactyly, syndactyly, brachydactyly (metacarpals may be elongated), polysyndactyly,

general: hypoplasia of mandible (micrognathia) + occiput of skull
clinodactyly, syndactyly, brachydactyly (metacarpals may be elongated), polysyndactyly,
